---
title: "Gartner"
page-layout: article
---

# Gartner

## Description

Information technology research platform providing reports, analysis, and trends on IT markets, vendors, and strategy. Supports technology management and digital transformation research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Technology & Innovation
- **Data/resource type:** Data Platform
- **Access model:** Open Access
- **Displayed topic:** Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://business.yale.edu/gartner/go)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
